LightningComponentBundle.description: Utility bar wrapper for Data Graph Visualizer that prompts for Individual ID

property.name: selectedDataGraph
property.label: Data Graph API Name
property.description: Set the API name of the Real-Time Data Graph to visualize

property.name: lookupKey
property.label: Lookup Key
property.description: DG Lookup key value. Use RECORD_ID as a placeholder for the Individual ID.

property.name: componentConfig
property.label: Component Config
property.description: Use https://bizcuit.github.io/rtdg_visualizer/ to create a JSON config for the component
